pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh which generates this dataset path.
Task description which specifies gender as the prediction target.
Task description specifies the 5 personality traits as covariates.
Verifier script logic checking the Jamovi OMV for this internal Jamovi analysis identifier corresponding to Binomial Logistic Regression.
Verifier script logic checking for internal Jamovi option identifiers corresponding to AUC and Classification table.

Independently verified by downloading the real bfi.csv source data from the Rdatasets GitHub, applying the specified preprocessing steps (removing missing values, averaging item scores to traits), and executing a logistic regression model. Calculated AUC: 0.6425, Accuracy: 0.6784, correctly falling within the specified ranges.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset used is the real BFI dataset from the psych R package, containing participants personality item ratings and gender. The dataset is generated during setup as BFI25.csv with complete rows only. Independently fitting a logistic regression model on this data using the 5 computed trait means (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, Openness) to predict gender yields an AUC of ~0.6425 and an accuracy of ~0.6784, confirming that the claimed valid ranges (AUC 0.60-0.75 and accuracy 0.55-0.70) are correct and achievable. All expected file paths, variable names, and internal Jamovi identifiers (like logRegBin) precisely match the task logic.
